info.title: is
info.description: is - developer assistant CLI for is/Cloud projects (build, cloud, AI).

commands.name: down
commands.description: Run docker compose down for a module (e.g., is down infra).

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show help information for available commands.

commands.name: tree
commands.description: Print a simplified repo tree (csproj, sln, cs).

commands.name: up
commands.description: Run docker compose up for a module (e.g., is up infra).
